profile.name: Anuj Singh Aitwal
profile.title: Finance, Accounting & Odoo ERP Professional
profile.tagline: Odoo Functional Consultant | Management Accountant | Audit Associate
profile.summary: Finance and accounting professional with 3 years and 1 month of combined experience in Odoo ERP implementation, auditing, and financial reporting. Skilled in process automation, financial modules, compliance management, and ERP solutions that improve efficiency.
profile.about: I help organizations improve finance operations, ERP workflows, accounting controls, reporting systems, and compliance processes. My work combines practical accounting knowledge with hands-on Odoo ERP implementation experience across sales, purchase, inventory, repair, subscription, expenses, and accounting modules.
profile.availability: Job, ERP implementation, accounting, audit, reporting, and business collaboration

services.title: Odoo ERP Implementation
services.text: Functional consulting for accounting, sales, purchase, inventory, repair, subscription, and expenses modules.

services.title: Accounting & Reporting
services.text: Financial reporting, VAT/TDS support, bookkeeping, reconciliation, and management reports.

services.title: Business Process Automation
services.text: Automation for invoices, bank statements, valuation workflows, cost centers, and operational reporting.

experience.role: Odoo Functional Consultant and Management Accountant
experience.company: Nepa Works Group company - US based
details: Supporting finance operations and Odoo functional workflows.
Working on ERP modules, reporting, accounting controls, and process improvements.

experience.role: Odoo Functional Consultant and Client Odoo Account Head
details: Implemented and customized Odoo ERP for Sales, Purchase, Inventory, Repair, Subscription, and Accounting modules.
Configured VAT reporting formats, Profit and Loss statement formats, inventory valuation workflows, and cost center separation for import operations.
Led accounting and finance module implementation with reconciliation, invoice processing, and bank statement automation.
Conducted audits for manufacturing, trading, NGO, and hospitality sectors.
Prepared financial statements and managed TDS/VAT filings for 15+ clients.
Handled payroll processing and statutory compliance.
Performed financial transaction testing and inventory audits.
Assisted in accounting software implementation and client training.
Prepared audit reports and supported tax compliance.

education: BBS 4th Year - Tribhuvan University - Currently Pursuing
achievements: Implemented Odoo Accounting & Finance modules with automation for reconciliation, invoices, and bank statements.
Designed cost center structures for import operations to improve financial tracking.
Optimized Sales, Purchase, Inventory, Repair, and Expenses modules for smoother operations.
Resolved complex valuation issues and improved system efficiency through automation.

projects.title: Odoo Accounting Automation
projects.text: Implemented automated reconciliation, invoice processing, and bank statement workflows to improve accounting accuracy and speed.

projects.title: Import Cost Center Setup
projects.text: Designed cost center separation for import operations to make expense allocation, valuation, and management reporting clearer.

projects.title: VAT & P&L Reporting Formats
projects.text: Configured VAT reporting and Profit and Loss formats aligned with client-specific business and compliance requirements.

blogs.title: How Odoo ERP Improves Finance Operations
blogs.excerpt: A short overview of how automation, module integration, and process design can improve finance team performance.
blogs.body: Odoo ERP can connect sales, purchase, inventory, accounting, bank reconciliation, and reporting in one workflow. With proper configuration, finance teams can reduce manual work, improve data visibility, and make better operational decisions.

blogs.title: Why Clean Reporting Matters
blogs.excerpt: Good reporting structure helps teams understand profitability, compliance status, and business performance faster.
blogs.body: Professional reporting is not just about numbers. It is about clarity, consistency, and making business information useful for management decisions.
